headline: 1 Momentum  Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Question
summary: The stocks in this article are all trading near their 52-week highs. This strength often reflects positive developments such as new product launches, favorable industry trends, or improved financial performance.

headline: Humana (HUM) Valuation Check As Barostim Medicare Advantage Coverage Expands For Heart Failure Patients
summary: Humana (HUM) is in focus after CVRx announced that the insurer has issued a Medicare Advantage coverage policy for Barostim therapy, including patients in the expanded BENEFIT-HF heart failure trial. See our latest analysis for Humana. The Barostim coverage decision comes as Humana’s latest share price of US$304.10 sits after a sharp 30 day share price return of 44.58% and a 90 day share price return of 59.63%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 25.69% contrasts with weaker 3 and 5...

headline: Humana (HUM) is Rebounding to a Multi-Year Improvement in Margins and Returns
summary: Eagle Capital Management, an investment management company, released its first quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The letter notes that individual stocks and subsectors are now more reactive to sentiments, reducing market efficiency but creating opportunities to add value. Over the last decade, multi-asset managers, or pods, […]

headline: Agilon Health (AGL) Appoints Tim O’Rourke as Chief Executive Officer
summary: Agilon Health Inc. (NYSE:AGL) is one of the best performing NYSE stocks so far in 2026. On April 27, Agilon Health announced the appointment of Tim O’Rourke as Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors, effective May 7. He succeeds Ronald A. Williams, who has served as Executive Chairman since August 2025 […]
